modeling_note: Derived from extended geo data for frame consistency through splashdown.

post_horizons_extension.summary: App-modeled ballistic continuation from the final published JPL HORIZONS Orion sample through splashdown.
post_horizons_extension.ui_note: The final descent from the last published Orion sample through splashdown is app-generated ballistic continuation data, not JPL HORIZONS vector data.
